allow: Bash(node -e "const XlsxPopulate = require\('xlsx-populate'\); XlsxPopulate.fromFileAsync\('procesos/inputs/Excel CCC Empresas.xlsx'\).then\(wb => { wb.sheets\(\).forEach\(s => { console.log\('Sheet:', s.name\(\)\); const r = s.usedRange\(\); if\(r\) { const rows = r.value\(\); console.log\('Headers:', rows[0]\); } }\); }\);")
